title: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text ...
full_text:
TechCrunch's Post
TechCrunch
June 4 at 12:23 PM ·
Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.
techcrunch.com
Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform | TechCrunch
All reactions:

Like

Most relevant
Brian I. Block Poking is back!?
1w
Scott Lewis texting an AI agent feels surprisingly natural
